title: Iranian Officials Say Proposed Peace Deal Would Open Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Iran has not formally responded to President Trump’s announcement that a peace deal was close. But officials suggested the oil choke point in the Strait of Hormuz could reopen.
summary_public: Iran has not formally responded to President Trump’s announcement that a peace deal was close. But officials suggested the oil choke point in the Strait of Hormuz could reopen.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Proposed Peace Deal Would Open Strait of Hormuz
